title: Cell Culture Laboratory Assistant (no exp required as training provided) - Pharma MNC #HMS
description:
Tuas - pick up at Jurong East / CCK
1 year contract
Salary up to 4k
No experience required as training will be provided
Manufacturing process trending, participating in process validation activities, providing technical support, drafting technical justifications and process understanding by process mapping  Additional activities include the design, execution, and interpretation of experiments to perform process characterization, evaluate novel technologies, identify process improvements, drafting risk assessments and providing technical expertise to support regulatory submissions  A basic understanding of cell culture or fermentation biology, process scale-up and statistical methods is essential. Hands-on experience working in the lab, aseptic technique, cell culture and bioreactor operations, to support the routine responsibilities with solid scientific data is also desirable.  The position necessitates extensive interaction with manufacturing, quality, purification process development as well as CMC/Regulatory Affairs groups

Interested candidates, do submit your resume to: jocelynchan@recruitexpress.com.sg OR telegram @jocelynchan

Jocelyn Chan| Consultant | Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifescience)

Company EA Licence number : 99C4599

Personnel EA License: R1331820

Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
